control.onfocus: RunScript(script.skin.madnox, action=process_ratings, output_tmdb=InfoDialog.TMDb.Percent, output_imdb=InfoDialog.IMDb.Percent, output_user=InfoDialog.User.Formatted, output_star=InfoDialog.User.StarValue, output_ready=InfoDialog.Ratings.Ready)

RunScript(script.skin.madnox, action=process_ratings, output_tmdb=InfoDialog.TMDb.Percent, output_imdb=InfoDialog.IMDb.Percent, output_user=InfoDialog.User.Formatted, output_star=InfoDialog.User.StarValue, output_ready=InfoDialog.Ratings.Ready)

item.label: $INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Awards),Awards: , ]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Total_Awards_Won), / Total Wins (TVDb): ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Total_Awards_Nominated), / Noms (TVDb): ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Award_Wins), / Wins (OMDb): ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.Award_Nominations), / Noms (OMDb): ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.academy_awards_won), / Oscars Won: ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.academy_awards_nominated), / Nom: ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.emmy_awards_won), / Emmys Won: ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.emmy_awards_nominated), / Nom: ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.goldenglobe_awards_won), / Globes Won: ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.goldenglobe_awards_nominated), / Nom: ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.bafta_awards_won), / BAFTA Won: ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.bafta_awards_nominated), / Nom: ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.sag_awards_won), / SAG Won: ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.sag_awards_nominated), / Nom: ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.criticschoice_awards_won), / Critics' Choice Won: ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.criticschoice_awards_nominated), / Nom: ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.mtv_awards_won), / MTV Won: ,]$INFO[Window(Home).Property(TMDbHelper.ListItem.mtv_awards_nominated), / Nom: ,]

[CAPITALIZE]$INFO[ListItem.Property(AudioLanguage.1),ID1: ,]$INFO[ListItem.Property(AudioLanguage.2), / ID2: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(AudioLanguage.3), / ID3: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(AudioLanguage.4), / ID4: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(AudioLanguage.5), / ID5: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(AudioLanguage.6), / ID6: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(AudioLanguage.7), / ID7: ][/CAPITALIZE]

[CAPITALIZE]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.1),ID1: ,]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.2), / ID2: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.3), / ID3: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.4), / ID4: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.5), / ID5: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.6), / ID6: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.7), / ID7: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.8), / ID8: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.9), / ID9: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.10), / ID11: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.11), / ID11: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.12), / ID12: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.13), / ID13: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.14), / ID14: ]$INFO[ListItem.Property(SubtitleLanguage.15), / ID15: ][/CAPITALIZE]

control.visible: String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,artist) + ![Control.HasFocus(1010) | Container(9000).HasFocus(101) | Control.HasFocus(1090) | Container(9000).HasFocus(109) | Control.HasFocus(1060) | Container(9000).HasFocus(106)]

!String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,artist) | Control.HasFocus(1010) | Container(9000).HasFocus(101) | Control.HasFocus(1090) | Container(9000).HasFocus(109) | Control.HasFocus(1060) | Container(9000).HasFocus(106)

!String.IsEqual(ListItem.DBType,artist) | Control.HasFocus(1010) | Container(9000).HasFocus(101) | Control.HasFocus(1090) | Container(9000).HasFocus(109) | Control.HasFocus(1060) | Container(9000).HasFocus(106)

value.condition: Container(9000).HasFocus(101) | Control.HasFocus(1010) | Container(9000).HasFocus(106) | Control.HasFocus(1060) | Container(9000).HasFocus(109) | Control.HasFocus(1090)
Container(9000).HasFocus(101) | Control.HasFocus(1010) | Container(9000).HasFocus(106) | Control.HasFocus(1060) | Container(9000).HasFocus(109) | Control.HasFocus(1090)
